basic_details.job_title: Karnataka Lokayukta Karya-Kam-Typist Recruitment 2026 – 26 Posts, Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Karnataka Lokayukta has released two separate notifications inviting online applications for Karya-Kam-Typist (Clerk-cum-Typist) posts in Group-C cadre. A total of 26 vacancies are on offer - 25 posts in the general/residual cadre and 1 post in the Kalyana Karnataka (local) cadre. Online applications open on 17 July 2026 and close on 17 August 2026 (11:59 PM). Applications are accepted only through the official website, lokayukta.karnataka.gov.in - no offline or postal applications will be accepted.

qualification.details: Academic Qualification: Candidates must have passed the Pre-University Course (PUC) / Class 12 Senior Secondary examination from a recognized state board or hold an equivalent qualification. | Technical Qualification: Applicants must have passed the Kannada and English Junior Grade Typewriting examinations conducted by the Karnataka Secondary Education Examination Board (KSEEB) or possess an equivalent recognized commercial qualification.

salary_details.karya-kam-typist (general cadre, 25 post: Not specified in the notification pages available for this article
salary_details.details: The pay scale is stated in the notification for the Kalyana Karnataka (local cadre) post as follows:

how_to_apply: Visit the official Karnataka Lokayukta website: lokayukta.karnataka.gov.in.
Applications are accepted only in online (electronic) mode.
Apply between 17 July 2026 and 17 August 2026 (till 11:59 PM).
Applications sent by post, courier, or submitted in person will not be accepted.
important_instructions: Only eligible candidates as per the applicable recruitment rules should apply. Applications must be submitted online only; no offline or in-person submission is allowed. Candidates should apply under the correct notification (general cadre or Kalyana Karnataka cadre) as applicable to them.

content_sections.heading: Karnataka Lokayukta Clerk Cum Typist Recruitment 2026 - Quick Overview
Karnataka Lokayukta Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Dates for admit card, exam, and result have not been released yet.

content_sections.heading: Karnataka Lokayukta Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The 26 Karya-Kam-Typist vacancies are split across two separate notifications based on cadre:

content_sections.heading: Eligibility
content_sections.text: Age limit, educational qualification, and other eligibility conditions for the Karya-Kam-Typist post are not specified in the notification pages available for this article. Candidates should check the full official notification on the Karnataka Lokayukta website before applying. Karnataka Lokayukta (Cadre, Recruitment and Conditions of Service of Officers and Staff) Rules, 1988 - Schedule-A Karnataka Civil Services (General Recruitment) Rules, 1977 Notification No. DPAR 19 SCR 2006, dated 14-08-2006 (applicable to the 25-post general cadre notification) Karnataka Public Employment (Hyderabad-Karnataka Region Reservation in Appointment) Order, 2013, and Order No. DPAR 06 PRAKS 2012, dated 06-11-2013 (applicable to the 1-post Kalyana Karnataka local cadre notification)

content_sections.heading: Educational Qualification
content_sections.text: Academic Qualification: Candidates must have passed the Pre-University Course (PUC) / Class 12 Senior Secondary examination from a recognized state board or hold an equivalent qualification. Technical Qualification: Applicants must have passed the Kannada and English Junior Grade Typewriting examinations conducted by the Karnataka Secondary Education Examination Board (KSEEB) or possess an equivalent recognized commercial qualification.

content_sections.heading: Karnataka Lokayukta Karya-Kam-Typist Salary
content_sections.text: The pay scale is stated in the notification for the Kalyana Karnataka (local cadre) post as follows:

rows.pay_scale: Not specified in the notification pages available for this article

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Karnataka Lokayukta Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Visit the official Karnataka Lokayukta website: lokayukta.karnataka.gov.in. Applications are accepted only in online (electronic) mode. Apply between 17 July 2026 and 17 August 2026 (till 11:59 PM). Applications sent by post, courier, or submitted in person will not be accepted.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only eligible candidates as per the applicable recruitment rules should apply. Applications must be submitted online only; no offline or in-person submission is allowed. Candidates should apply under the correct notification (general cadre or Kalyana Karnataka cadre) as applicable to them.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in Karnataka Lokayukta Karya-Kam-Typist Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 26 vacancies in total - 25 in the general cadre and 1 in the Kalyana Karnataka (local) cadre.

faq.question: Q2. When can I apply online for Karnataka Lokayukta recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Online applications can be submitted from 17 July 2026 to 17 August 2026 (till 11:59 PM).

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted only online through lokayukta.karnataka.gov.in. Offline, postal, or in-person applications are not accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Karya-Kam-Typist post in Karnataka Lokayukta?
faq.answer: The notification states a pay scale of 34100-800-35700-900-39300-1000-43300-1125-47800-1250-52800-1375-58300-1500-64300-1650-67600 for the 1-post Kalyana Karnataka cadre vacancy. The pay scale for the 25-post general cadre vacancies is not specified in the notification pages available for this article.

faq.question: Q5. Who issued this recruitment notification?
faq.answer: The notification was issued by the Registrar, Karnataka Lokayukta, Dr. B.R. Ambedkar Veedhi, Bengaluru-560001, dated 14 July 2026.
